title: Certara MCP tool-provider manifest
description: Contract a provider package ships at inst/mcp/tools/manifest.json so the Certara.R MCP host can expose its tools. Builder-based only: the manifest names an exported function that returns a list of ellmer tool() objects.

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version. The host loads manifests sharing its MAJOR version whose MINOR is not newer.

package.description: Provider package name that exports the builder (and optional status_hook).

builder.description: Name of an exported function in `package` that returns a list of ellmer tool() objects. Optionally accepts a `groups` argument for launch-profile filtering.

status_hook.description: Optional: name of an exported `function(project_dir)` in `package` returning that provider's own project status. Unrelated to `builder`; validated only when present (see .mcp_call_status_hook() in mcp_project_status.R).
